results.rendered_html:
upagata p. p.
1 Gone to, approached, arrived.
2 Occurred, happened.
3 Near, at hand.
4 Got, obtained.
5 Undergone, experienced.
6 Furnished with.
7 Gone to, become.
8 Promised, agreed.
9 Passed away, dead.
10 Feeling, suffering (actively used).
— taṃ
1 Wealth acquired.
2 Receipt; dhanī vopagataṃ dadyāt svahastaparicihnitaṃ  Y. 2. 93.
